subject: [PATCH v3 1/2] x86/tdx: Fix off-by-one in port I/O handling

reviews.author: Edgecombe, Rick P
reviews.summary: Provided a Reviewed-by tag without any specific comments or suggestions.

2026-05-27.patch_summary: The patch fixes an off-by-one error in the port I/O handling code for TDX (Trusted Execution Environment) on x86 architecture. The issue arises from incorrect mask calculation using GENMASK, which results in a one-bit too wide mask for all I/O sizes. The fix adjusts the mask calculation to correctly handle the bit width.
